caption: A man with a towering, grey, textured hairstyle and glasses is seated in a studio setting, wearing a white dress shirt, a red bowtie, and gold suspenders. He wears black over-ear headphones and speaks into a professional black microphone positioned in front of him. In the background, a woman with pink hair, wearing a green dress, stands with her back to the camera. The walls are decorated with a framed picture of a face and a logo featuring a shield and the text "UNIQUE FASHIONS." Two red and white logos appear on the screen: one on the left reads "#STALKD PODCAST" and one on the right reads "BOSS TALK 101." Throughout the sequence, the man remains in a similar position, talking into the microphone, while the woman in the background shifts her posture, eventually raising her arm.
